name: Do I get paid if I can't return to warehouse work after injury?

mainEntity.name: Do I get paid if I can't return to warehouse work after injury?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, retraining, partial disability, or total if unable (e.g., 66% wage ongoing).** Vocational rehab included.[3] Key factors: doctor releases; job market. Apply early; max duration varies. Permanent awards common.[3]
